title: matelea hirsutissima
intro: Matelea hirsutissima, also known as the hairy Matelea or hairy swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Matelea hirsutissima include relief from pain, fever reduction, and treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Matelea hirsutissima can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and stems to create a tincture.
